name: [QUIZ-18] Render no-round guard instead of Internal Server Error
description: Direct Chrome navigation to the quiz play route without a round returned an Internal Server Error in static web export instead of the documented no-round recovery guard.
acceptanceCriteria: Opening /quiz/play without a roundId renders the documented no-round guard with recovery navigation, not an Internal Server Error. Browser regression coverage asserts the guard testID.
bodyText:
Completion Summary — 2026-06-19
What was done:
- Landed PR #1235 into main for WI-820.
- Fixed the follow-up CI failures that appeared after the main retarget: flag-on identity-v2 integration cleanup and book-suggestion concurrency.
What changed:
- Book suggestions now wait for the short final advisory lock before inserting, so a cooldown-only caller cannot cause the real writer to return success with zero inserted suggestions.
- Added a deterministic integration regression for that final-lock race.
- Updated the v2 legacy-identity test cleanup helper to remove v2 subscription/subscription-payer rows before deleting people or organizations.
Verification:
- PR #1235 checks are green: main, API Quality Gate, Flag-ON integration (IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED), run-smoke, Playwright web smoke, Merge completeness check, claude-review, CodeRabbit.
- Local targeted verification passed: book-suggestion regression red/green, book-suggestion unit suite (37 tests), failed CI co-located suites (17 tests), helper-related co-located integration set (26 passed, 28 skipped by suite conditions), tsc --build, git diff --check, api lint with pre-existing warnings only.
- Pre-push validation passed: tsc --build plus 29 related API suites / 941 tests.
Caveats / Follow-ups:
- Local raw Nx/Jest full co-located collection in the Windows worktree did not collect tests without explicit globs, so the authoritative full Linux lane was the GitHub Actions flag-on integration check, which passed before merge.
